pass_summaries.summary: Revised Chapter 4 to fix all packet findings: Viktor's opening now uses fresh procedural language; Yuki Kim's death is rendered on-page through Noor's witness of her final breaths; the first-floor breaker-cabinet confrontation is made tactically legible and names Ben Mercer as the second victim; the fire-extinguisher continuity break and Priya phone contradiction are removed; and chapter-level prose tics are reduced to two uses of 'fluorescent' and zero em-dash lines.

Revised Chapter 4 toward more physical aftermath and cleaner sentence-level variety: the anonymous-stabbing fallout, Lena's emergent resource authority, and the post-message splintering now register through on-page changes, while the repeated scaffolded character-read phrasing has been replaced with gesture and material detail.
